reports.title: Guide
reports.query:
This report is for comparing study metadata. 

You can choose to compare two different studies or two versions of a study.

To compare select the studies to compare in the first tab - **Select Studies**.

On the **Select Studies** tab, in the first panel you can choose to only show differences (default: Yes) or all (No).

reports.title: Select Project(s)
reports.query:
MATCH (p:Project)-[:HAS_FIELD]->(:StudyProjectField)<-[:HAS_PROJECT]-(s:StudyValue)
WHERE toLower(toString(p.`project_number`)) CONTAINS toLower($input) 
RETURN DISTINCT p.`project_number` as value,  p.`project_number` as display ORDER BY size(toString(value)) ASC LIMIT 10

reports.title: Select Base
reports.query:
CALL apoc.when(size($neodash_project)=0,"match(sr:StudyRoot)-[r0:HAS_VERSION]->(s:StudyValue)
with r0, s, CASE WHEN s.subpart_id is not null THEN s.study_id_prefix+'-'+s.study_number+'-'+s.subpart_id ELSE s.study_id_prefix+'-'+s.study_number END as trialid
with s, trialid 
match (sr:StudyRoot)-[r0:HAS_VERSION]->(s)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sr)-[r1:LATEST]->(s)
optional match(s)<-[r:AFTER]-(sact:StudyAction)
with distinct s,trialid,sr.uid as StudyRoot, collect(r0.status) as statuses ,collect(r0.version) as versions, type(r1) as Latest,sact.date as date order by StudyRoot, sact.date
with s,StudyRoot, s.study_acronym as acronym, trialid, split(apoc.temporal.format(date, 'iso_local_date_time'),'.')[0] as Date, case when 'LOCKED' in statuses then 'LOCKED' else 'DRAFT' END as Status,
apoc.text.join(apoc.coll.toSet(versions),'') as Version,Latest 
return StudyRoot, trialid as TrialID, acronym as Acronym, Date, Version, Latest,Status, 'Base' as Select, id(s) as id_a",
"match(p:Project)-[:HAS_FIELD]->(:StudyProjectField)<-[:HAS_PROJECT]-(s:StudyValue) 
where p.project_number in $a
match(sr:StudyRoot)-[r0:HAS_VERSION]->(s:StudyValue)
with r0, s, CASE WHEN s.subpart_id is not null THEN s.study_id_prefix+'-'+s.study_number+'-'+s.subpart_id ELSE s.study_id_prefix+'-'+s.study_number END as trialid
with s, trialid
match (sr:StudyRoot)-[r0:HAS_VERSION]->(s)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sr)-[r1:LATEST]->(s)
optional match(s)<-[r:AFTER]-(sact:StudyAction)
with distinct s,trialid,sr.uid as StudyRoot, collect(r0.status) as statuses ,collect(r0.version) as versions, type(r1) as Latest,sact.date as date order by StudyRoot, sact.date
with s,StudyRoot, s.study_acronym as acronym, trialid, split(apoc.temporal.format(date, 'iso_local_date_time'),'.')[0] as Date, case when 'LOCKED' in statuses then 'LOCKED' else 'DRAFT' END as Status,
apoc.text.join(apoc.coll.toSet(versions),'') as Version,Latest 
return StudyRoot, trialid as TrialID, acronym as Acronym, Date, Version, Latest,Status, 'Base' as Select, id(s) as id_a",{a:$neodash_project}) YIELD value 
RETURN  value.StudyRoot as StudyRoot, 
value.TrialID as `Trial ID`,
value.Acronym as Acronym,
value.Date as Date,
value.Version as Version,
value.Status as Status,
value.Latest as Latest, 
value.Select as Select,
value.id_a as __id_a order by `Trial ID`, Date

reports.title: Selected Studies
reports.query:
MATCH (sr:StudyRoot)-[r0:HAS_VERSION]->(s:StudyValue)
WHERE id(s) IN [toInteger($neodash_studya), toInteger($neodash_studyb)]
WITH
  CASE
    WHEN count(distinct sr) > 1 THEN 'Across Study'
    ELSE 'Within Study'
  END AS compare_type
WITH compare_type
match(sr:StudyRoot)-[r0:HAS_VERSION]->(s:StudyValue) where id(s) in[toInteger($neodash_studya),toInteger($neodash_studyb)]
with compare_type,r0, s, sr, s.study_id_prefix+'-'+s.study_number as trialid, 
CASE when id(s)=toInteger($neodash_studya) then 'Base' ELSE 'Compare' END as Study
with compare_type,s, sr, trialid, Study
match (sr:StudyRoot)-[r0:HAS_VERSION]->(s)
optional match(s)<-[r:AFTER]-(sact:StudyAction)
with distinct compare_type,s,sr.uid as StudyRoot,Study, trialid, collect(r0.status) as statuses ,collect(r0.version) as versions, sact.date as date order by trialid, sact.date
with compare_type,s,StudyRoot,Study, trialid, split(apoc.temporal.format(date, 'iso_local_date_time'),'.')[0] as Date, case when 'LOCKED' in statuses then 'LOCKED' else 'DRAFT' END as Status,
apoc.text.join(apoc.coll.toSet(versions),'') as Version 
return Study,
trialid as TrialID, Date, Version, Status, compare_type as `Compare Type`, StudyRoot order by Study, Version

reports.title: Show Only Differences
reports.query:
WITH ['Yes','No'] as diffs UNWIND diffs as diff
WITH diff WHERE toLower(diff) CONTAINS toLower($input) 
RETURN DISTINCT diff as value,  diff as display ORDER BY display DESC

reports.title: Study Field Comparison
reports.query:
call apoc.when($neodash_differences_only contains "Yes","match(s:StudyValue) where id(s) in[$neodash_studya,$neodash_studyb]
with s, s.study_id_prefix+'-'+s.study_number as trialid,  CASE when id(s)=toInteger($neodash_studya) then 'Base' ELSE 'Compare' END as study
with s, trialid, study 
match (s)-[r1]->(txt:StudyField) where txt.field_name is not null 
optional match (txt)-[r2]->(:CTTermRoot)-[r3:HAS_NAME_ROOT]->(:CTTermNameRoot)-[r4:LATEST]->(term)
optional match (txt)-[r5]->(x)-[:LATEST]->(term2)
with distinct study, trialid, term, term2, apoc.text.capitalize(apoc.text.join(split(txt.field_name,'_'),' ')) as field ,txt.value as value
with study, trialid, field, value, term, collect(term2.name) as term2
with study, trialid, field, CASE WHEN term is not null then term.name else CASE WHEN size(term2)>0 then apoc.text.join(term2,',') ELSE value END END as value
with study, trialid,field,value where not field contains 'null value code'
with distinct study, trialid, field,value
with field, apoc.map.fromPairs(collect([study,value])) as map
with field as StudyField,map[toString('Base')] as Base, map['Compare'] as Compare
WITH StudyField,Base, Compare,
CASE WHEN Base = Compare THEN 'no' ELSE CASE WHEN Base is null and Compare is null THEN 'no' ELSE 'yes' END END as Diff 
WITH StudyField,Base, Compare, Diff where Diff='yes'
return StudyField, Base, Compare, Diff "
,"match(s:StudyValue) where id(s) in[$neodash_studya,$neodash_studyb]
with s, s.study_id_prefix+'-'+s.study_number as trialid,  CASE when id(s)=toInteger($neodash_studya) then 'Base' ELSE 'Compare' END as study
with s, trialid, study 
match (s)-[r1]->(txt:StudyField) where txt.field_name is not null 
optional match (txt)-[r2]->(:CTTermRoot)-[r3:HAS_NAME_ROOT]->(:CTTermNameRoot)-[r4:LATEST]->(term)
optional match (txt)-[r5]->(x)-[:LATEST]->(term2)
with distinct study, trialid, term, term2, apoc.text.capitalize(apoc.text.join(split(txt.field_name,'_'),' ')) as field ,txt.value as value
with study, trialid, field, value, term, collect(term2.name) as term2
with study, trialid, field, CASE WHEN term is not null then term.name else CASE WHEN size(term2)>0 then apoc.text.join(term2,',') ELSE value END END as value
with study, trialid,field,value where not field contains 'null value code'
with distinct study, trialid, field,value
with field, apoc.map.fromPairs(collect([study,value])) as map
with field as StudyField,map[toString('Base')] as Base, map['Compare'] as Compare
WITH StudyField,Base, Compare,
CASE WHEN Base = Compare THEN 'no' ELSE CASE WHEN Base is null and Compare is null THEN 'no' ELSE 'yes' END END as Diff 
WITH StudyField,Base, Compare, Diff 
return StudyField, Base, Compare, Diff",{neodash_studya:$neodash_studya, neodash_studyb:$neodash_studyb}) YIELD value
return value.StudyField as `Study Field`,
value.Base as Base,
value.Compare as Compare, 
value.Diff as __Diff order by `Study Field`

reports.title: Endpoints (by Objective)
reports.query:
call apoc.when($neodash_differences_only contains 'Yes',"match(s:StudyValue) where id(s) in[toInteger($neodash_studya),toInteger($neodash_studyb)]
with s, CASE when id(s)=toInteger($neodash_studya) then 'Base' ELSE 'Compare' END as study
optional match (s)-[r3]->(endp:StudyEndpoint)-[r3_1]->(endp_val:EndpointValue)
optional match (s)-[r4]->(obj:StudyObjective)-[r4_1]->(obj_val:ObjectiveValue)
match(endp)-[:STUDY_ENDPOINT_HAS_STUDY_OBJECTIVE]->(obj)
with study, obj, obj_val, endp, endp_val,
'Obj '+toString(obj.order) + ' - Endp '+toString(endp.order) as Number,
obj_val.name_plain as Objective, 
endp_val.name_plain as Endpoint
with Number, Objective, apoc.map.fromPairs(collect([study,Endpoint])) as map
with Number , Objective,map['Base'] as `Base - Endpoint`, map['Compare'] as `Compare - Endpoint`,
CASE WHEN map['Base'] = map['Compare'] THEN 'no' ELSE CASE WHEN map['Base'] is null and map['Compare'] is null THEN 'no' ELSE 'yes' END END as Diff order by Number
with Number, Objective, `Base - Endpoint`,`Compare - Endpoint`, Diff where Diff='yes'
return Number, Objective, `Base - Endpoint`,`Compare - Endpoint`, Diff","match(s:StudyValue) where id(s) in[toInteger($neodash_studya),toInteger($neodash_studyb)]
with s, CASE when id(s)=toInteger($neodash_studya) then 'Base' ELSE 'Compare' END as study
optional match (s)-[r3]->(endp:StudyEndpoint)-[r3_1]->(endp_val:EndpointValue)
optional match (s)-[r4]->(obj:StudyObjective)-[r4_1]->(obj_val:ObjectiveValue)
match(endp)-[:STUDY_ENDPOINT_HAS_STUDY_OBJECTIVE]->(obj)
with study, obj, obj_val, endp, endp_val,
'Obj '+toString(obj.order) + ' - Endp '+toString(endp.order) as Number,
obj_val.name_plain as Objective, 
endp_val.name_plain as Endpoint
with Number, Objective, apoc.map.fromPairs(collect([study,Endpoint])) as map
with Number , Objective,map['Base'] as `Base - Endpoint`, map['Compare'] as `Compare - Endpoint`,
CASE WHEN map['Base'] = map['Compare'] THEN 'no' ELSE CASE WHEN map['Base'] is null and map['Compare'] is null THEN 'no' ELSE 'yes' END END as Diff order by Number
return Number, Objective, `Base - Endpoint`,`Compare - Endpoint`, Diff",{neodash_studya:$neodash_studya, neodash_studyb:$neodash_studyb}) YIELD value

value.`Base - Endpoint` as `Base - Endpoint`,

reports.title: Visit Attribute Changes
reports.query:
call apoc.when($neodash_differences_only contains  'Yes', 
//First
"match(s:StudyValue) where id(s) in[toInteger($neodash_studya),toInteger($neodash_studyb)]
with s, CASE when id(s)=toInteger($neodash_studya) then 'Base' ELSE 'Compare' END as study
optional match (s)-[:HAS_STUDY_VISIT]->(vis)
optional match(vis)-[:HAS_VISIT_NAME]->(vis_name_root)-[:HAS_VERSION]->(vis_name:VisitNameValue)
optional match(vis)-[r]->(x_r)-[:HAS_VERSION]->(x) where not type(r)='HAS_VISIT_NAME' 
    with study, x, [k in keys(vis) where not k='uid']  as vis_keys, properties(vis) as vis_props, vis_name.name as `Visit Name`, vis.visit_number as `Visit Number`, [i in labels(x) where not (i contains 'ConceptValue' or i contains 'Template' or i contains 'Numeric' or i contains 'VisitName') ][0] as types
with study, `Visit Name`, `Visit Number`, substring(types,0, size(types)-5) as type, x, vis_keys, vis_props, CASE when not vis_keys is null THEN  range(0,size(vis_keys)-1,1) else [0] END AS coll_size 
with study, `Visit Name`, `Visit Number`, type, CASE when x.value is null then x.name ELSE x.value+' ('+x.name+')' END as value, vis_keys, vis_props, coll_size 
with study, `Visit Name`, `Visit Number`, collect(apoc.map.fromPairs([[type,value]])) as map, [k in vis_keys | apoc.map.fromPairs([[apoc.text.capitalize(replace(k,'_',' ')),apoc.text.capitalize(toLower(replace(toString(vis_props[k]),'_',' ')))]])] as add_maps
with study, `Visit Name`, `Visit Number`, CASE WHEN not add_maps is null THEN apoc.map.mergeList(apoc.coll.flatten([map,add_maps])) ELSE apoc.map.mergeList(map) END as map 
with study, `Visit Name`, `Visit Number`, map,  CASE when not map is null THEN range(0,size(keys(map))-1,1) ELSE [0] END AS coll_size 
UNWIND coll_size AS idx
with study, `Visit Name`, `Visit Number`, 
CASE WHEN not isEmpty(map) THEN keys(map)[idx] ElSE null END as type, CASE WHEN not isEmpty(map) THEN map[keys(map)[idx]] ELSE null END as value
with `Visit Name`, `Visit Number`, type,  apoc.map.fromPairs(collect([study,value]))  as visit_info_map
WITH
`Visit Name`, 
`Visit Number`, 
type as `Visit Property Type`, 
visit_info_map['Base'] as Base, 
visit_info_map['Compare'] as Compare,
CASE WHEN visit_info_map['Base'] = visit_info_map['Compare'] THEN 'no' ELSE 'yes' END as Changed order by  `Visit Number`,`Visit Property Type` 
WITH `Visit Name`, `Visit Number`,`Visit Property Type`, Base, Compare, Changed where Changed='yes'
return `Visit Name`, `Visit Number`,`Visit Property Type`, Base, Compare, Changed",
//second
"
match(s:StudyValue) where id(s) in[toInteger($neodash_studya),toInteger($neodash_studyb)]
with s, CASE when id(s)=toInteger($neodash_studya) then 'Base' ELSE 'Compare' END as study
optional match (s)-[:HAS_STUDY_VISIT]->(vis)
optional match(vis)-[:HAS_VISIT_NAME]->(vis_name_root)-[:HAS_VERSION]->(vis_name:VisitNameValue)
optional match(vis)-[r]->(x_r)-[:HAS_VERSION]->(x) where not type(r)='HAS_VISIT_NAME' 
    with study, x, [k in keys(vis) where not k='uid']  as vis_keys, properties(vis) as vis_props, vis_name.name as `Visit Name`, vis.visit_number as `Visit Number`, [i in labels(x) where not (i contains 'ConceptValue' or i contains 'Template' or i contains 'Numeric' or i contains 'VisitName') ][0] as types
with study, `Visit Name`, `Visit Number`, substring(types,0, size(types)-5) as type, x, vis_keys, vis_props, CASE when not vis_keys is null THEN  range(0,size(vis_keys)-1,1) else [0] END AS coll_size 
with study, `Visit Name`, `Visit Number`, type, CASE when x.value is null then x.name ELSE x.value+' ('+x.name+')' END as value, vis_keys, vis_props, coll_size 
with study, `Visit Name`, `Visit Number`, collect(apoc.map.fromPairs([[type,value]])) as map, [k in vis_keys | apoc.map.fromPairs([[apoc.text.capitalize(replace(k,'_',' ')),apoc.text.capitalize(toLower(replace(toString(vis_props[k]),'_',' ')))]])] as add_maps
with study, `Visit Name`, `Visit Number`, CASE WHEN not add_maps is null THEN apoc.map.mergeList(apoc.coll.flatten([map,add_maps])) ELSE apoc.map.mergeList(map) END as map 
with study, `Visit Name`, `Visit Number`, map,  CASE when not map is null THEN range(0,size(keys(map))-1,1) ELSE [0] END AS coll_size 
UNWIND coll_size AS idx
with study, `Visit Name`, `Visit Number`, 
CASE WHEN not isEmpty(map) THEN keys(map)[idx] ElSE null END as type, CASE WHEN not isEmpty(map) THEN map[keys(map)[idx]] ELSE null END as value
with `Visit Name`, `Visit Number`, type,  apoc.map.fromPairs(collect([study,value]))  as visit_info_map
WITH
`Visit Name`, 
`Visit Number`, 
type as `Visit Property Type`, 
visit_info_map['Base'] as Base, 
visit_info_map['Compare'] as Compare,
CASE WHEN visit_info_map['Base'] = visit_info_map['Compare'] THEN 'no' ELSE 'yes' END as Changed order by  `Visit Number`,`Visit Property Type` 
WITH `Visit Name`, `Visit Number`,`Visit Property Type`, Base, Compare, Changed
return `Visit Name`, `Visit Number`,`Visit Property Type`, Base, Compare, Changed
",{neodash_studya:$neodash_studya, neodash_studyb:$neodash_studyb}) YIELD value
return value.`Visit Name` as`Visit Name`, 
value.`Visit Number` as `Visit Number`, 
value.`Visit Property Type` as `Visit Property Type`, 
value.Base as Base, 
value.Compare as Compare,
value.Changed as __Diff order by `Visit Number`,`Visit Property Type`

reports.title: Planned Collections at Visits
reports.query:
MATCH (sr:StudyRoot)-[:HAS_VERSION]->(s:StudyValue)
WHERE id(s) IN [toInteger($neodash_studya), toInteger($neodash_studyb)]
WITH
  sr,
  s,
  id(s) AS sid,
  CASE
    WHEN id(s) = toInteger($neodash_studya) THEN 'Base'
    ELSE 'Compare'
  END AS study
OPTIONAL MATCH
  (s)-[:HAS_STUDY_ACTIVITY]->
  (act)-[:HAS_SELECTED_ACTIVITY]->
  (act_val:ActivityValue)
OPTIONAL MATCH
  (s)-[:HAS_STUDY_ACTIVITY_SCHEDULE]->
  (schedule)<-[:STUDY_ACTIVITY_HAS_SCHEDULE]-
  (act:StudyActivity)
OPTIONAL MATCH
  (s)-->
  (act)<-[:AFTER]-
  (action:StudyAction)-[:BEFORE]->
  (act_prev)<--
  (sx:StudyValue),
  (act_prev)-->(prev_act_val:ActivityValue)
WHERE id(sx) IN [toInteger($neodash_studya), toInteger($neodash_studyb)]
OPTIONAL MATCH (s)-[:HAS_STUDY_VISIT]->(vis:StudyVisit)
OPTIONAL MATCH
  (vis)-[:HAS_VISIT_NAME]->
  (vis_name_root)-[:HAS_VERSION]->
  (vis_name:VisitNameValue)
OPTIONAL MATCH
  (vis)-[:STUDY_VISIT_HAS_SCHEDULE]->(schedule:StudyActivitySchedule)
WITH DISTINCT
  vis.visit_number AS `Visit ID`,
  vis.short_visit_label AS `Visit Short Label`,
  prev_act_val.name as `Previous Activity`,
  act_val.name AS Activity,
  apoc.map.fromPairs(collect([study, 'x'])) AS map
WHERE Activity IS NOT NULL
WITH
  `Visit ID`,
  `Visit Short Label`,
  Activity,
  `Previous Activity`,
  map['Base'] AS `Base - collection`,
  map['Compare'] AS `Compare - collection`
ORDER BY `Visit ID`, Activity
WITH
  `Visit ID`,
  `Visit Short Label`,
  Activity,
  `Previous Activity`,
  `Base - collection`,
  `Compare - collection`,
  CASE
    WHEN
      `Base - collection` = 'x' AND `Compare - collection` IS NULL
      THEN 
        CASE 
          WHEN `Previous Activity` IS NOT NULL THEN 'Replaced'
          ELSE 'Added'
        END
    ELSE
      CASE
        WHEN
          `Base - collection` IS NULL AND `Compare - collection` = 'x'
          THEN 
            CASE 
              WHEN `Previous Activity` IS NOT NULL THEN 'Replaced'
              ELSE 'Deleted'
            END
        ELSE 
          CASE 
            WHEN `Previous Activity` IS NOT NULL THEN 'Replaced'
            ELSE 'No change'
          END
      END
  END AS `Change Type`
WHERE
  $neodash_differences_only = 'No' OR `Change Type` <> 'No change'
RETURN DISTINCT
  `Visit ID`,
  `Visit Short Label`,
  Activity,
  `Previous Activity`,
  `Base - collection`,
  `Compare - collection`,
  `Change Type`

OPTIONAL MATCH

  (ct_root:CTTermContext)-[:HAS_SELECTED_TERM]->

OPTIONAL MATCH

OPTIONAL MATCH

WITH DISTINCT
  version_dates,
  compare_type,
  study,

  s_group.name AS s_group,
  act_val.name + '(Data collection: ' + act_val.is_data_collected + ')' AS act_detail,

// Create a unique key for each activity + group + subgroup combination
WITH

  compare_type,
  act_detail,
  prev_activity,
  coalesce(flowchart_grp, 'NULL') + '|' + coalesce(group, 'NULL') + '|' + coalesce(s_group, 'NULL') AS group_key,
  study,
  flowchart_grp,
  group,
  s_group
// Now aggregate by activity detail AND group combination
WITH
  version_dates,
  compare_type,
  act_detail,
  prev_activity,
  group_key,
  apoc.map.fromPairs(collect(DISTINCT [study, flowchart_grp])) AS flowchart_grp,
  apoc.map.fromPairs(collect(DISTINCT [study, group])) AS group,
  apoc.map.fromPairs(collect(DISTINCT [study, s_group])) AS s_group
WITH
  compare_type,
  version_dates['Base'] AS base_version_date,
  flowchart_grp['Base'] AS `SoA Group (Base)`,
  group['Base'] AS `Activity Group (Base)`,
  s_group['Base'] AS `Activity Subgroup (Base)`,
  version_dates['Compare'] AS compare_version_date,
  flowchart_grp['Compare'] AS `SoA Group (Compare)`,
  group['Compare'] AS `Activity Group (Compare)`,
  s_group['Compare'] AS `Activity Subgroup (Compare)`,
  act_detail AS `Activity Detail`,
  prev_activity AS `Previous Activity`
WHERE `Activity Detail` IS NOT NULL
WITH

  `SoA Group (Base)`,
  `Activity Group (Base)`,
  `Activity Subgroup (Base)`,
  compare_version_date,
  `SoA Group (Compare)`,
  `Activity Group (Compare)`,
  `Activity Subgroup (Compare)`,
  `Activity Detail`,
  `Previous Activity`,
  CASE
    WHEN
      compare_type = 'Within Study'
      THEN
        CASE
          WHEN
            base_version_date <= compare_version_date AND
            `SoA Group (Base)` IS NOT NULL AND
            `SoA Group (Compare)` IS NULL
            THEN
              CASE
                WHEN `Previous Activity` IS NOT NULL THEN 'Replaced'
                ELSE 'Activity deleted'
              END
          ELSE
            CASE
              WHEN
                base_version_date <= compare_version_date AND
                `SoA Group (Base)` IS NULL AND
                `SoA Group (Compare)` IS NOT NULL
                THEN
                  CASE
                    WHEN `Previous Activity` IS NOT NULL THEN 'Replaced'
                    ELSE 'Activity added'
                  END
              ELSE
                CASE
                  WHEN
                    base_version_date >= compare_version_date AND
                    `SoA Group (Base)` IS NOT NULL AND
                    `SoA Group (Compare)` IS NULL
                    THEN
                      CASE
                        WHEN `Previous Activity` IS NOT NULL THEN 'Replaced'
                        ELSE 'Activity added'
                      END
                  ELSE
                    CASE
                      WHEN
                        base_version_date >= compare_version_date AND
                        `SoA Group (Base)` IS NULL AND
                        `SoA Group (Compare)` IS NOT NULL
                        THEN
                          CASE
                            WHEN `Previous Activity` IS NOT NULL THEN 'Replaced'
                            ELSE 'Activity deleted'
                          END
                      ELSE
                        CASE
                          WHEN
                            (coalesce(`SoA Group (Base)`, '') <> coalesce(`SoA Group (Compare)`, '')) OR
                            (coalesce(`Activity Group (Base)`, '') <> coalesce(`Activity Group (Compare)`, '')) OR
                            (coalesce(`Activity Subgroup (Base)`, '') <> coalesce(`Activity Subgroup (Compare)`, ''))
                            THEN
                              CASE
                                WHEN `Previous Activity` IS NOT NULL THEN 'Replaced'
                                ELSE 'Activity moved'
                              END
                          ELSE
                            CASE
                              WHEN `Previous Activity` IS NOT NULL THEN 'Replaced'
                              ELSE 'No change'
                            END
                        END
                    END
                END
            END
        END
    ELSE
      CASE
        WHEN
          `SoA Group (Base)` IS NOT NULL AND `SoA Group (Compare)` IS NULL
          THEN
            CASE
              WHEN `Previous Activity` IS NOT NULL THEN 'Replaced'
              ELSE 'Activity deleted'
            END
        ELSE
          CASE
            WHEN
              `SoA Group (Base)` IS NULL AND `SoA Group (Compare)` IS NOT NULL
              THEN
                CASE
                  WHEN `Previous Activity` IS NOT NULL THEN 'Replaced'
                  ELSE 'Activity added'
                END
            ELSE
              CASE
                WHEN
                  (coalesce(`SoA Group (Base)`, '') <> coalesce(`SoA Group (Compare)`, '')) OR
                  (coalesce(`Activity Group (Base)`, '') <> coalesce(`Activity Group (Compare)`, '')) OR
                  (coalesce(`Activity Subgroup (Base)`, '') <> coalesce(`Activity Subgroup (Compare)`, ''))
                  THEN
                    CASE
                      WHEN `Previous Activity` IS NOT NULL THEN 'Replaced'
                      ELSE 'Activity moved'
                    END
                ELSE
                  CASE
                    WHEN `Previous Activity` IS NOT NULL THEN 'Replaced'
                    ELSE 'No change'
                  END
              END
          END
      END
END AS `Change Type`
WITH
  `Change Type`,
  `SoA Group (Base)`,
  `Activity Group (Base)`,
  `Activity Subgroup (Base)`,
  `SoA Group (Compare)`,
  `Activity Group (Compare)`,
  `Activity Subgroup (Compare)`,
  `Activity Detail`,
  `Previous Activity`
WHERE
  $neodash_differences_only = 'No' OR `Change Type` <> 'No change'
RETURN
  `Change Type`,
  `SoA Group (Base)`,
  `Activity Group (Base)`,
  `Activity Subgroup (Base)`,
  `SoA Group (Compare)`,
  `Activity Group (Compare)`,
  `Activity Subgroup (Compare)`,
  `Activity Detail`,
  `Previous Activity`

reports.title: Current Study Selection
reports.query:
MATCH (sr:StudyRoot)-[r0:HAS_VERSION]->(s:StudyValue)
WHERE id(s) IN [toInteger($neodash_studya), toInteger($neodash_studyb)]
WITH
  CASE
    WHEN count(distinct sr) > 1 THEN 'Across Study'
    ELSE 'Within Study'
  END AS compare_type
WITH compare_type
match(sr:StudyRoot)-[r0:HAS_VERSION]->(s:StudyValue) where id(s) in[toInteger($neodash_studya),toInteger($neodash_studyb)]
with compare_type,r0, s, sr, s.study_id_prefix+'-'+s.study_number as trialid, 
CASE when id(s)=toInteger($neodash_studya) then 'Base' ELSE 'Compare' END as Study
with compare_type,s, sr, trialid, Study
match (sr:StudyRoot)-[r0:HAS_VERSION]->(s)
optional match(s)<-[r:AFTER]-(sact:StudyAction)
with distinct compare_type,s,sr.uid as StudyRoot,Study, trialid, collect(r0.status) as statuses ,collect(r0.version) as versions, sact.date as date order by trialid, sact.date
with compare_type,s,StudyRoot,Study, trialid, split(apoc.temporal.format(date, 'iso_local_date_time'),'.')[0] as Date, case when 'LOCKED' in statuses then 'LOCKED' else 'DRAFT' END as Status,
apoc.text.join(apoc.coll.toSet(versions),'') as Version 
return Study,
trialid as TrialID, Date, Version, Status, compare_type as `Compare Type`, StudyRoot order by Study, Version

reports.title: Change Type
reports.query:
with ["Added", "No Change", "Moved", "Deleted", "Replaced"] as list
unwind(list) as Status
return Status
